name: SwingNEat, Trackman, indoor golf course, Willoughby golf course, mentor golf course, golf simulator, indoor golf simulator
about: SwingNEat is a family entertainment center that combines indoor golf simulator technology with a full-service restaurant and bar. The venue features high-end Trackman simulators within dedicated golf bays, providing year-round golfing opportunities. It offers a casual, multifunctional space designed for both dining and recreation, with a focus on providing a fun experience for groups of varying sizes. The venue is equipped with self-service dining options from multiple eateries and a beverage wall, catering to patrons looking for a social outing that includes both food and golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman simulator technology for accurate ball and club tracking
On-site dining and beverage options available for a complete entertainment package
Multiple booking options including hourly bay rates and memberships for flexibility
Indoor environment allows for golf practice and play regardless of weather conditions

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining with three eateries: P&P Pizzeria, Bombay Burrito, and Krispy Krunchy Chicken. Take-out and dine-in options are available.
Self-serve beer wall with 30 different brews/drinks available.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end Trackman simulators in dedicated bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue likely provides rental clubs for use with their simulators if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. SwingNEat offers its own full-service dining and bar with multiple food options and a self-serve beer wall.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 1 to 2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, SwingNEat is a family entertainment center that welcomes children and offers a casual, fun atmosphere suitable for families.
